ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., memory, processor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Supply Voltage) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for this parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for this parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Typical or nominal value for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Allowable tolerance for the parameter */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is critical for the component's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter this specification refers to */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specification */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification becomes effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the specification (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, ns) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter this entry refers to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
